As the horizon extends to 1 month and 3 months, random walk dynamics and the potential macroeconomic tail risks (such as a shutdown) increase uncertainty. Adhering to the instruction that uncertainty should increase with forecast horizon (pulling distant dates closer to 0.5), I have set the short-term probability highest, smoothly decaying toward 50% for the subsequent resolution dates.
